package rulecoverage

func PositiveMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTests() string {
    ruleID := "mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_tests"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Many copy-pasted mock repository structs with the same method sets."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
